name: Allowance of Deductions for Nonresident Aliens

eligibility.description: Nonresident alien individuals must file a timely U.S. tax return to claim any deductions or credits against U.S. source income.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Ensures nonresident aliens receive the benefit of deductions and credits by filing a true and accurate tax return.
